TLPL489

Internship in Education

TLPL489

Internship in Education

Total Credits

1 The 14-16 credits of math and science must be completed with a minimum grade of "C-" in each course and an overall GPA of 2.7.

2 Minimum grade, "B-" 3 Courses which may satisfy the university's general education

requirements and which are required in the Elementary Education program of studies
